items.title: Pakistan defence minister says country in 'open war' with Afghanistan after strikes
items.dek: The latest attacks by Pakistan follow months of clashes between the two countries. despite agreeing to a fragile ceasefire in October.
items.body: The latest attacks by Pakistan follow months of clashes between the two countries. despite agreeing to a fragile ceasefire in October.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Spanish opposition calls for disgraced ex-monarch to return from exile
items.dek: The 88-year-old Juan Carlos should spend his last years in dignity, the leader of Spain's main opposition party says.
items.body: The 88-year-old Juan Carlos should spend his last years in dignity, the leader of Spain's main opposition party says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Former US diplomat sentenced to life for abusing two girls in Burkina Faso
items.dek: He used the girls' mother's life-threatening illness as an opportunity to demand sex, said the US Office of Public Affairs.
items.body: He used the girls' mother's life-threatening illness as an opportunity to demand sex, said the US Office of Public Affairs.
